mapper.select: SELECT id, id_device, COMM_FAIL_34kv_feed_1_meter_comm_fail, COMM_FAIL_34kv_feed_2_meter_comm_fail, COMM_FAIL_34kv_feed_3_meter_comm_fail, COMM_FAIL_34kv_feed_4_meter_comm_fail, COMM_FAIL_34kv_outgoing_meter_comm_fail, COMM_FAIL_34kv_sst_meter_comm_fail, COMM_FAIL_69kv_meter_comm_fail, COMM_FAIL_Ge500_rtu_comm_fail, COMM_FAIL_Idec_plc_comm_fail, COMM_FAIL_Line_prot_m1_comm_fail, COMM_FAIL_Ws_comm_fail, COMM_FAIL_Xf_prot_m1_comm_fail, COMM_FAIL_Xf_prot_m2_comm_fail FROM ${datatablename} WHERE id_device = #{id_device} AND ( COMM_FAIL_34kv_feed_1_meter_comm_fail > 0 OR COMM_FAIL_34kv_feed_2_meter_comm_fail > 0 OR COMM_FAIL_34kv_feed_3_meter_comm_fail > 0 OR COMM_FAIL_34kv_feed_4_meter_comm_fail > 0 OR COMM_FAIL_34kv_outgoing_meter_comm_fail > 0 OR COMM_FAIL_34kv_sst_meter_comm_fail > 0 OR COMM_FAIL_69kv_meter_comm_fail > 0 OR COMM_FAIL_Ge500_rtu_comm_fail > 0 OR COMM_FAIL_Idec_plc_comm_fail > 0 OR COMM_FAIL_Line_prot_m1_comm_fail > 0 OR COMM_FAIL_Ws_comm_fail > 0 OR COMM_FAIL_Xf_prot_m1_comm_fail > 0 OR COMM_FAIL_Xf_prot_m2_comm_fail > 0 ) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `alert_queue`( `id_device`, `id_error`, `start_date`, `end_date`, `asset`, `capacity` )VALUES( #{id_device}, #{id_error}, #{start_date}, #{end_date}, #{asset}, #{capacity} );
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() as id
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.`text` as name, s.description, s.status, s.is_delete FROM error s LEFT JOIN device_group t ON t.id = s.id_device_group WHERE s.is_delete = 0 AND s.status = 1 AND s.`text` LIKE '%COMM_FAIL%' AND s.id_device_group = #{id_device_group} ORDER BY s.id ASC

SELECT u.id FROM alert u LEFT JOIN error e ON e.id = u.id_error WHERE u.id_device = #{id_device} AND u.id_error = #{id_error} AND u.status = 1 AND u.is_delete = 0 AND e.is_delete = 0 AND e.status = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT u.id FROM alert_queue u LEFT JOIN error e ON e.id = u.id_error WHERE u.id_device = #{id_device} AND u.id_error = #{id_error} AND u.status = 1 AND u.is_delete = 0 AND e.is_delete = 0 AND e.status = 1 AND u.is_queue = 0
